# The Living Tarot
> Learn to read the cards like they're talking to you.

The Living Tarot is a comprehensive tarot education resource created by Kalesh, a Consciousness Teacher & Writer. The site explores tarot through three simultaneous lenses: traditional symbolism, Vedantic perspective, and somatic experience.

## About
- Author: Kalesh — Consciousness Teacher & Writer
- Website: https://kalesh.love
- Approach: Three-lens tarot (Traditional, Vedantic, Somatic)
- Content: 300 in-depth articles across 5 categories

## Categories
- The Major Arcana: Journey through the 22 cards of transformation
- The Minor Arcana: The 56 cards of daily life
- The Spreads: Layouts and patterns for reading
- The Intuition: Developing felt sense in card reading
- The Practice: Daily rituals and embodied approaches

## Key Pages
- Home: https://livingtarot.love/
- Articles: https://livingtarot.love/articles
- Start Here: https://livingtarot.love/start-here
- Daily Draw: https://livingtarot.love/daily-draw
- Quizzes: https://livingtarot.love/quizzes
- About: https://livingtarot.love/about
